name: openathor
description: OpenAthor TypeScript CLI and protocol kernel.

scripts.test: npm run check && npm run validate:schemas && npm run build && npm run test:fixtures && npm run test:judge:smoke
scripts.test:fixtures: npm run test:fixtures:slice1 && npm run test:fixtures:slice2 && npm run test:fixtures:slice3 && npm run test:fixtures:slice4
scripts.test:fixtures:slice1: npm run fixture -- fixtures/slice-1/new-project && npm run fixture -- fixtures/slice-1/adopt-3-chapters && npm run fixture -- fixtures/slice-1/scattered-drafts && npm run fixture -- fixtures/slice-1/adopt-ambiguous-order
scripts.test:fixtures:slice2: npm run fixture -- fixtures/slice-2/draft-confirm-write && npm run fixture -- fixtures/slice-2/draft-title-fallback && npm run fixture -- fixtures/slice-2/revise-confirm-write && npm run fixture -- fixtures/slice-2/revise-hash-conflict
scripts.test:fixtures:slice3: npm run fixture -- fixtures/slice-3/outline-archive && npm run fixture -- fixtures/slice-3/outline-insert && npm run fixture -- fixtures/slice-3/outline-move
